sourcePolicy: Popularity snapshots are deterministic API reads from GitHub repositories or Hugging Face model metadata when available. Hardware coverage uses official vendor documentation and a curated coverage-priority rank because cross-vendor popularity metrics are not comparable.

layers.popularityBasis: GitHub stars among selected open-source or source-available user-facing AI applications.
